chunk-0011.ward: The source uses the ordinary verb phrase 'ward them off'; the contextually correct target is 驅退, not the glossary's magical-object noun 防護結界.

chunk-0049.the Dragon: This occurrence is inside the shortened spell name 'Teeth of the Dragon'; the approved contextual short form is 塔格奧之牙, while standalone the Dragon remains 巨龍.
